arts.ttl: Preview: Borussia Monchengladbach vs. Borussia Dortmund - prediction, team news, lineups

arts.ttl: Ex-West Ham and Borussia Dortmund striker admits La Liga struggles – “My profile doesn’t necessarily fit”
arts.sum: Leganes’ acquisition of Sebastien Haller was hailed as a top signing during the summer, although expectations have not been met so far. The on-loan Borussia Dortmund striker has played nine times this season, and he has failed to get off the mark in the scoring department. arts.ttl: Borussia Dortmund to welcome two key players back for Barcelona showdown
arts.sum: German heavyweights Borussia Dortmund are expected to have a pair of injured players back available for selection in time for the club’s meeting with Barcelona. Dortmund and Barca are of…
